testimonial1.content: StudyLink helped me understand algebra clearly and prepare for my exams.

testimonial2.content: The lessons are easy to follow and the progress tracker keeps me motivated.

testimonial3.content: I improved my English writing and feel ready for school tests.

about.title: About StudyLink
about.header: Helping Cameroon students learn school subjects with confidence
about.storydescription: StudyLink supports secondary and high school students with curriculum-focused lessons, progress tracking, and study group support tailored for Cameroon.
about.meetdescription: Our learning team develops lessons in Mathematics, Physics, ICT, English, French, and other core subjects for school success.
about.instructor1: Experienced subject teachers focused on student success
about.instructor2: Curriculum developers who understand exam preparation
about.instructor3: Tutors supporting guided study and progress goals
about.studentstitle: What Our Students Have to Say

contactUs.title: Need Help with Your Studies?
contactUs.header: Reach out to StudyLink support for help with subjects, enrollment, or progress tracking.

contactfaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
contactfaq.question1: How do I join a subject on StudyLink?
contactfaq.answer1: Browse available subjects, select the one you want, and enroll to start lessons and quizzes right away.
contactfaq.question2: Can I study multiple subjects at once?
contactfaq.answer2: Yes. You can enroll in several subjects, track your progress, and move through lessons at your own pace.
contactfaq.question3: How do I access quiz results?
contactfaq.answer3: After completing a quiz, your score and answers are shown immediately so you can review and improve.
contactfaq.answer4: Study groups let learners join together to discuss topics, share tips, and stay motivated while preparing for exams.

checkout.description: Complete your purchase to get instant access
checkout.securePaymentDescription: All transactions are encrypted and processed securely through Fapshi payment gateway.

checkout.step2: You'll receive a payment prompt on your phone, else dial *126# for MTN or *150# for Orange
